title: Ego-Pi: VLA Fine-Tuning for Ego-Centric Human and Robot Data
summary: Ego-Pi addresses robotic data scarcity by leveraging egocentric human video data to train humanoid robots with dexterous hands. The work co-trains vision-language-action models on human and robot data together, enabling robots to learn high-level task semantics such as sorting logic and skill composition. The approach achieves success rates of 90% or higher on the tested dexterous manipulation tasks.
